features: Christmas decoration set - Minicoco Christmas decoration set has 12pc different sizes and styles of paper fans and honeycomb balls to meet various decoration needs and bring more happy atmosphere to the party.

Suitable for all kinds of scenes - Minicoco Christmas decorations classic color matching and perfect style, perfect for Christmas New Year winter theme party decoration. Besides home party decorations, it can also be used in various scenes such as offices, stores, bars, etc.
High quality - Christmas decoration set is made of high quality paper, easy to use, can be reused will not go out of style. It is easy to use and only takes a few minutes to complete the assembly.

Multi-use - All the accessories in the Christmas paper fan set come with a lanyard, not only can be hung on the ceiling, walls, windows or doors, but also can be placed on the dining table, fireplace, railing store to decorate the holiday atmosphere.
Best Service - We are committed to providing high quality products, if you have any questions feel free to contact us, we will provide the best service!
description: Product description Minicoco Christmas Decorations Set, 12pcs Snowflake Paper Fans Honeycomb Santa Hat Christmas Trees Bell Party Decoration Contents: 4 Snowflake Paper Fan (30cm Red* 2, 25cm White * 2) 4 Snowflake Paper Fan Decorations(30cm Green * 2, 30cm White * 2) 30x25cm Honeycomb Santa Hat * 2 30*26cm Paper Honeycomb Christmas Tree * 2 Notice: Long hanging ropes are not included in the package. Safety Warning Do not use with ropes not provided by the manufacturer. Keep away from open flames. Keep out of reach of children and pets.
